name: Black Bean Soup (Rapp)
recipeInstructions:
1. Simmer the beans in water until soft.
2. In a large pot, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add onions and cook until golden brown.
3. Stir in green pepper, celery, and carrots. Cook for 5 minutes.
4. Add garlic, cumin, white vinegar, and soy sauce. Mix well and cook for 3 minutes.
5. Drain about half the bean water, then add it back to the pot. Stir everything together.
6. Adjust seasoning with salt if needed. Simmer over low heat for 30 minutes.
7. Combine the vegetables with the beans. Continue simmering for another 30 minutes, adding more water as necessary to reach your desired consistency.
